actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,kh.company_name 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.kh_id=[客户索赔.客户编号]) and permission('客户资料')
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

       cymx.jzry,
       cymx.zgdd,
       cymx.tjry,
       cymx.ysfp,
       cymx.zdry
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[客户索赔.索赔详细.发票号码])

actions.expression:
SELECT wxhtsheet.sid,
       wxhtsheet.zje,
       wxhtsheet.zwpm,
       wxhtsheet.khhh,
       wxhtsheet.cpbh
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.pid) 
  AND (wxht.order_id=[客户索赔.索赔详细.外销合同]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.bjhh=[客户索赔.索赔详细.专业货号]) 
  AND permission('外销合同') 
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 客户索赔.赔款合计
actions.caption: 客户索赔.赔款合计
actions.expression: [客户索赔.赔款合计2]+[客户索赔.现金赔款]

actions.name: 客户索赔.剩余金额
actions.caption: 客户索赔.剩余金额
actions.expression: [客户索赔.实际赔付]-[客户索赔.赔款合计]

actions.expression: ([客户索赔.赔款进展表.外销单价]-[客户索赔.赔款进展表.赔款单价])*[客户索赔.赔款进展表.合同数量]
actions.output: 客户索赔.赔款进展表.赔款金额

SELECT cymx.fphm,cymx.SID
FROM cymx where (cymx.fphm=cymx.chydh) and (cymx.khmc=[客户索赔.客户名称])
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT(cymxsheet.wxht) wxht
FROM cymx,cymxsheet
WHERE   (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.PID)
   AND  (cymx.fphm=[客户索赔.索赔详细.发票号码])
actions.caption: 索赔详细.外销合同

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT (khsheet3.kh_id)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.bjhh,wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.PID)
   AND  (wxht.order_id=[客户索赔.索赔详细.外销合同])

SELECT wxhtsheet.cpbh,wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.order_id=[客户索赔.索赔详细.外销合同])
   AND  (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.PID)
    AND permission('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.khhh,wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.PID)
   AND  (wxht.order_id=[客户索赔.索赔详细.外销合同])

SELECT DISTINCT(cymxsheet.cght)
FROM cymx,cymxsheet
WHERE   (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.PID)
   AND  (cymx.fphm=[客户索赔.索赔详细.发票号码])
   AND  (cymxsheet.wxht=[客户索赔.索赔详细.外销合同])

通过
不通过

SELECT DISTINCT(cymxsheet.ysfp)
FROM cymxsheet
WHERE   (cymxsheet.gcmc=[客户索赔.索赔详细.专业工厂])
   AND  (cymxsheet.fpsb1="是")
   AND  (cymxsheet.sjcy>="2019-12-15")
ORDER BY cymxsheet.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.bjhh, wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.PID)
   AND  (wxht.order_id=[客户索赔.赔款进展表.外销合同])
    AND permission('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.cpbh,wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.PID)
   AND  (wxht.order_id=:order_id)
    AND CheckRole('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.khhh, wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.PID)
   AND  (wxht.order_id=[客户索赔.赔款进展表.外销合同])
    AND permission('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.SID ASC
